notes: Pose and mantle/fin/arm layout are recognizably this photo, but the long tentacles are truncated and the silhouette is broken by photo-trace edge noise that undermines FAO plate restraint.
specific_issues: long curved tentacles from the photo are missing or stubby — defining feature lost
silhouette is fragmented with many small disconnected dash artifacts along edges
fin shape is exaggerated/stretched compared to the photo's mantle fin
stipple is scattered noise rather than concentrated chromatophore fields
interior contains stray short dashes that read as photo-trace clutter, not scientific stipple
arm tips lack the clear ring-sucker rendering seen in FAO plates
head/mantle junction is muddled rather than a clean continuous contour
